title: Encryption key rotation exceeds policy threshold
description: Provider rotates KMS keys every 18 months versus our 12-month requirement for restricted data.
remediationPlan: Vendor committed to 12-month rotation; contractual addendum in legal review.

title: Annual security assessment overdue
description: Vendor has not returned the security questionnaire 30+ days past due.
remediationPlan: Escalation issued to vendor account manager; review onboarding alternatives.

title: Sub-processor list not contractually pinned
description: Vendor may add sub-processors without 30-day prior notice clause.
remediationPlan: Add sub-processor notification clause at next renewal.

title: Disaster recovery RTO not independently tested
description: DR runbooks exist but no evidence of an independent failover test in last 12 months.
remediationPlan: Risk accepted for one cycle; joint failover test scheduled for Q4.

title: Quarterly access review evidence incomplete
description: Two of four quarterly access reviews lacked sign-off artifacts.
remediationPlan: Backfilled evidence and added calendar controls. Closed.

title: Single-region warehouse concentration risk
description: All fulfilment routed through one facility with no hot standby.
